ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN budget REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN campaign_name TEXT
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN campaign_uuid TEXT
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN created_from_metric_id TEXT
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN cta_type TEXT
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN device_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN message_status INTEGER
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN metric_id TEXT
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN reserved_message_count INTEGER
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN scheduled_timestamp LONG_INT
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcast_campaigns ADD COLUMN sent_timestamp LONG_INT
ALTER TABLE premium_broadcasts_dynamic_audience_sources ADD COLUMN pending_action INTEGER

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS premium_broadcast_campaigns( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, broadcast_jid TEXT NOT NULL, pending_message_id LONG_INT, wamessage_id TEXT, ad_group_id TEXT, ad_campaign_id TEXT, ad_creative_id TEXT, ad_campaign_group_id TEXT, ad_id TEXT, creation_job_state INTEGER, failure_count INTEGER, failure_message TEXT, created_timestamp LONG_INT, updated_timestamp LONG_INT )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS premium_broadcast_insight_event( event_type INTEGER NOT NULL, event_timestamp LONG_INT NOT NULL, premium_broadcast_id LONG_INT NOT NULL, broadcast_jid TEXT NOT NULL, user_jid TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (event_type, premium_broadcast_id, user_jid) )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS premium_broadcast_insight_target( target_jid TEXT NOT NULL, premium_broadcast_id LONG_INT NOT NULL, has_replied BOOL NOT NULL, sent_timestamp LONG_INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (target_jid, premium_broadcast_id) )
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS premium_broadcast_list( broadcast_jid TEXT NOT NULL, created_timestamp LONG_INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (broadcast_jid) )
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS premium_broadcasts_audience( broadcast_jid TEXT NOT NULL, audience_id TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (broadcast_jid, audience_id) )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS premium_broadcasts_dynamic_audience_sources( broadcast_jid TEXT NOT NULL, dynamic_audience_type INTEGER NOT NULL, dynamic_audience_id INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (broadcast_jid, dynamic_audience_type, dynamic_audience_id) )
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS premium_broadcast_campaigns_uuid_index ON premium_broadcast_campaigns (campaign_uuid COLLATE binary ASC)
